title: Tidal Overhaul
description: Tidal Overhaul is a mod that adds small things, and is meant to be vanilla friendly!
body:
# Tidal Overhaul  

Tidal Overhaul expands Minecraft’s oceans with new resources, tools, and mechanics that enhance survival and exploration. Discover a new mid-tier metal, craft early-game bamboo gear, and harness unique effects that alter combat and mobility. Brave the frozen waters with chilling enchantments and potions, encounter new aquatic life, and take advantage of new ways to traverse the depths. Whether you're fishing, fighting, or forging ahead, Tidal Overhaul brings new challenges and opportunities to Minecraft’s aquatic world.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c7924c92bdd850e0b5882b5864d1630694a94a.png)

## **Tidal Overhaul - Features**  

- **Titanium Ore** – Ore  
- **Titanium Ingot** – Material  
- **Titanium Armor** – Armor Set  
- **Titanium Tools** – Tool Set  
- **Bamboo Fishing Rod** – Tool  
- **Bamboo Spear** – Weapon  
- **Chilled** – Effect  
- **Floaty** – Effect  
- **Chilled Potion** – Potion  
- **Floaty Potion** – Potion  
- **Frostbane** – Enchantment  
- **Chilled Trout** – Mob  
- **Frozen Zombie** – Mob  
- **Chilly Soup** – Food  
- **Titan Shield** – Shield
- **~~Herobrine~~**

![Spinning Fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46aa1e2bf46aa0e8b193cb52df716329068a15be.gif)

### REMEMBER TO HAVE FUN!!

(requires geckolib)
